meaning: n.(中亚、西伯利亚的冬带冰雪、夏带飞沙的)布冷风
examples: Every USSR citizen was proud of the country's space exploration program. One of the top Soviet spaceships, called "Buran", could deliver weapons of mass destruction to the orbit.
The Buran is the kind of load the world's biggest aircraft are called on to haul.
The An-225 Cossack aircraft (wingspan 291 feet, 2 inches) was built to transport the Soviet Union's Buran orbiter, their equivalent of the U.S. Space Shuttle.
